since_last: 80% of 84 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.14%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 80% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.69% · BTC -1.95% · Gold +1.02% · Nasdaq100 +1.68%. 80% of 84 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.14%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.14%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.35%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: CEVA is the standout at +11.41%
cards.body: Leaders: CEVA +11.41%, AMD +10.09%, ANET +9.23%, VRT +8.63%, AMBA +7.08%. Laggards: AVAV -4.73%, INTU -2.77%, HON -2.31%, UPST -1.75%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.70% at $160.86
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.70% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
